title: Clair de Lune Palm Moses Basket Undressed - 75 x 28 x 24 cm, Natural, CL936
availability_text: Only 11 left in stock (more on the way).
features: HANDWOVEN ORGANIC PALM BASKET: A sturdy and sustainable Moses Basket handwoven from organic palm leaf. An eco-conscious choice for parents who value environmentally-friendly products.
NATURALLY BREATHABLE: A naturally breathable Moses Basket, the woven design enhances airflow within the basket ensuring your baby's comfort.

CUSTOMISE TO YOUR STYLE: Accessorise the Moses Basket to suit your style, add a Clair de Lune mattress, sheet and bedding to complete the look. The Moses Basket will fit all Clair de Lune bedding sets.

SAFE SLEEPING : It’s recommended that you room-share with a newborn, and our Moses Basket provides a safe and secure option. It conforms to the BS EN 1466:2014 safety standard and is quality checked in-house. Suitable from birth to 9kg.
EASY-CARE: The palm leaves are easy to wipe clean, ensuring hassle-free maintenance and a hygeinic sleep space for your baby.
description: A hand-woven Moses basket made using quality palm leaf and features two handles for portability. Fits all Clair de Lune Moses bedding sets. A naturally breathable design the weave allows airflow throughout the basket to keep your newborn comfortable. Style the Moses basket your own way - just add a mattress, sheet and a stylish Clair de Lune blanket to complete the look!
